name: Google Fast Pair
description: Google Nearby Fast Pair over BLE — service UUID 0xFE2C (discoverable model ID ads and non-discoverable account key bloom payloads), plus canonical Fast Pair GATT profile.
author: Google (spec)
notes:
Advertising: BR/EDR discoverable providers carry 24‑bit Fast Pair Model ID in Service Data 0xFE2C per provider spec (≤100 ms interval; BLE addr must not rotate in that mode). When not discoverable, providers advertise Fast Pair Account Data in the same service data (≤250 ms) when they have≥1 persisted account key — version byte plus Account Key bloom filter TLV and Salt TLV. Optional Battery Notification extension may follow the salt: length/type nibble plus per‑component octets (left bud, right bud, case), each 0bSVVVVVVV. Interval and rotation rules apply at the UX layer.
Seeker-visible GATT: Fast Pair service 0xFE2C (Model ID read; Key-based pairing / Passkey write+notify; Account Key write). Optional Device Information Service 0x180A with Firmware Revision 0x2A26. Additional Data characteristic FE2C1237 flows use handshake shared secret plus AES‑CTR+HMAC‑SHA256 as defined in characteristics spec.
Find Hub Network (FHN) / Find My Device Network (FMDN): providers that support Google’s locator / tracking extension expose characteristic FE2C1238‑8366‑4814‑8EB0‑01DE32100BEA (Beacon actions) on the same 0xFE2C service — read/write/notify for nonce plus HMAC‑authenticated writes (provisioning, ring, unwanted‑tracking protection, Precision Finding / ranging, etc.) and separate FHN LE advertisement payloads. DULT applies to certified accessories. Spec: https://developers.google.com/nearby/fast-pair/specifications/extensions/fmdn
Bundled `fast_pair/fast_pair_models.json` catalogs 24‑bit model IDs (WhisperPair `model_ids.csv` CC BY‑4.0, then DiamondRoPlayz README for missing ids). Regenerate: `python mobile/scripts/build_fast_pair_models_catalog.py`.
